papers.title: Zimbabwe cervical cancer biorepository: FFPE specimens with HIV documentation
papers.institution: Parirenyatwa Group of Hospitals / University of Zimbabwe
papers.access_route: Collaborative agreement with University of Zimbabwe College of Health Sciences; IRB and MTA required; contact corresponding author
papers.notes: n=410 FFPE cervical cancer; HIV status documented (serology); squamous cell carcinoma and adenocarcinoma; FIGO stage I-II dominant; young patient population (median age <45); HPV type on subset

papers.title: HIV-HPV co-infection and cervical cancer risk in Zimbabwe
papers.institution: Parirenyatwa Group of Hospitals / University of Zimbabwe
papers.access_route: Same institutional access as primary biorepository paper; collaborative research with UZ
papers.notes: Draws from same Zimbabwe biorepository; HPV genotyping and HIV serology documented; confirms HIV screening approach; FIGO stage I-II in majority; young women (20-44) dominant

expected_retrievable_institutions: Parirenyatwa Group of Hospitals / University of Zimbabwe
notes: Both papers draw from the same Parirenyatwa Hospital / University of Zimbabwe biorepository. It is the only identified collection meeting all criteria: FFPE, HIV screened, young patients, Stage I dominant. Single-institution collection; international collaboration requires MTA and local IRB. No commercial access route identified.
